sapitos.title: SAPitos 2.0
sapitos.subtitle: AI-Powered Smart Supply Chain
sapitos.description: Winner of SAP Labs Final Showcase 2025. An award-winning smart supply chain solution for boutique apparel SME, focused on automating and optimizing logistics using SAP technologies with AI-powered features.

opsight.title: Opsight
opsight.subtitle: AI-Powered Aviation Logistics
opsight.description: HACK Monterrey 2025 - AI, Computer Vision the new real-life vision. Opsight redefined aviation logistics by engineering an autonomous AI system that orchestrates, analyzes, and optimizes in-flight inventory through computer vision and neural networks.

urbanMobility.title: Urban Mobility Multi-Agent Simulation
urbanMobility.subtitle: Real-time Urban Intersection Simulation
urbanMobility.description: Engineered a real-time urban intersection simulation using Python (AgentPy) and Unity. Modeled autonomous vehicles, pedestrians, and traffic lights to optimize flow and safety. Integrated a FastAPI for backend-frontend communication.

awakDashboard.title: AWAQ WEB
awakDashboard.subtitle: User Progress Visualization
awakDashboard.description: A comprehensive dashboard for visualizing user progress in their onboarding process. Built with C# and modern web technologies, this tool provides detailed insights into user engagement and progression analytics.

awakGame.title: AWAK Game
awakGame.subtitle: Unity Game Development
awakGame.description: Interactive Unity game project developed as part of a collaborative team effort. Features engaging gameplay mechanics and modern game development practices using Unity engine and C#.

buffettec.title: BuffetTEC
buffettec.subtitle: Mobile Legal Assistance App
buffettec.description: A mobile application for the dissemination and management of legal situations, allowing users to recognize and address their legal problems efficiently and securely. Developed for the Criminal Clinic of Tecnologico de Monterrey.

cybersecurity.title: Cybersecurity Expertise
cybersecurity.subtitle: Security Analysis & Penetration Testing
cybersecurity.description: Comprehensive cybersecurity knowledge with hands-on experience in penetration testing, vulnerability assessment, and security auditing. Proficient in Kali Linux and various security tools for identifying and mitigating security threats.
